news.t: Schwab Ramps Up Competition With 4 New ETF Fee Cuts
Schwab Asset Management Reduces Fees on Four Equity Index ETFs

holdings.infoBox: SCHC is an equity ETF with a total of 2247 individual holdings. The top holdings are Msci Eafe Jun26 Ifus 20260619 stock at 0.63%, Aritzia at 0.45%, Hudbay Minerals at 0.41%, Finning International at 0.35%, and Accelleron Industries AG at 0.34%.

overview.description: The Schwab International Small-Cap Equity ETF (SCHC) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in small-cap stocks. The fund tracks a market-cap-weighted index of the smallest 10% of companies in the FTSE Developed ex-US Index. SCHC was launched on Jan 14, 2010 and is issued by Charles Schwab.
infoTable: FTSE Custom Developed Small Cap ex-US Liquid Net of Tax (Lux)

data.title: Schwab Ramps Up Competition With 4 New ETF Fee Cuts
data.text: On Thursday, June 11, Schwab Asset Management announced that it cut down the expense ratios on four of its existing indexed ETFs. Each of these funds is a longstanding strategy in Schwab's collection,...
